overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village during golden hour. The character moves along dirt paths past wooden fortifications, market stalls, and festival decorations while NPCs populate the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance path with wooden ramparts and market stalls

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking along the dirt path
camera passes close to large wooden fortification wall on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path, following an NPC briefly before continuing alone

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead on the path in the same direction
merchant standing near the market stall canopy

entered.detail: tall wooden log wall with grass growing at the base
market stall with red fabric roof and hanging goods
tall wooden poles with triangular pennant flags strung between them
lush purple flowering shrubs lining the path
snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a wide dirt path entering a medieval village. Wooden fortifications line the left side while market stalls with red canopies appear on the right. The golden hour sun casts long shadows across the trail as the character passes purple flowering bushes and approaches festival banner poles in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow shaded passage between wooden village houses

events.description: entering deeply shadowed area between tall wooden buildings
passing through the darkest point of the narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the narrow shaded passage between wooden buildings, navigating the darker corridor

notable_agents.action: child in green tunic running past in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall dark wooden village house with small windows creating deep shadows
large red canvas tent visible at the end of the narrow passage
crumbling stone wall section between wooden structures

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, shadowed alley between dark wooden village houses. The lighting drops significantly as the path becomes enclosed, with only glimpses of sky visible above. A child runs past in the opposite direction as Geralt continues toward a red festival tent visible at the passage exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open festival ground with tents and decorative banners

events.description: emerging from shadows into bright golden hour sunlight
entering the main festival area with multiple tents and market stalls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the bustling festival area with tents and decorations, passing various villagers

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress carrying a white parasol walking along the path
villager browsing goods near the stone ruin wall

entered.detail: large cream-colored canvas tent with peaked roof
ancient stone wall ruins covered in moss and vegetation
strings of red triangular pennant flags hanging across the path
wooden market stall displaying various goods and produce

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark passage, the scene opens into a bright festival ground filled with cream-colored tents and red bunting flags strung overhead. The crowd density increases as villagers browse market stalls. Stone ruins line the left side while the path widens, revealing more of the village festival atmosphere under the golden afternoon sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with hanging decorations and scattered buildings

events.description: slight turn to follow the curving village path
passing underneath hanging banner decorations overhead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the village path, navigating past various NPCs and decorative elements

notable_agents.action: child running alongside the path keeping pace with the character

entered.detail: traditional wooden village house with thatched roof and timber framing
low stone wall covered in grass and wildflowers
rickety wooden picket fence lining the path
red fabric banner with emblem hanging from a wooden post

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a more residential area of the village with rustic wooden houses and overgrown stone walls. Red banners and bunting decorations hang overhead, occasionally occluding the view. The character passes a child running alongside the path as the trail curves gently through the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to fortified village gate with wooden palisades

events.description: sun position creates strong backlit effect as the character approaches the gate
approaching the fortified wooden gate structure at the village edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the fortified gate at the edge of the village, passing other villagers heading in the same direction

notable_agents.action: villager walking toward the gate entrance alongside the character
figure standing near the gate structure ahead

entered.detail: large wooden fortified gate structure with heavy beams and defensive features
tall wooden palisade fence extending from the gate structure
tall wooden poles with flags mounted near the gate entrance
wooden scaffolding structure near the palisade wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a fortified wooden gate at the village edge, backlit by the setting sun creating a warm glow. Wooden palisade walls extend on the left while tall flagpoles mark the entrance. Other villagers walk alongside as the character moves toward the gate structure, completing the journey through the festival village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village, transitioning from an open sunlit entrance through a shadowed alleyway and into a vibrant festival ground. It begins with Geralt walking along a wide dirt path lined with wooden fortifications and red-canopied market stalls under the long shadows of the golden hour. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a dark, enclosed alley between wooden houses where the light drops significantly before opening back up into a bright plaza filled with cream-colored tents and red bunting. The camera then glides through a residential area of rustic houses and overgrown stone walls, passing under hanging banners that occasionally occlude the view. Finally, the trail curves toward a fortified wooden gate at the village edge, where the setting sun creates a warm, backlit glow against the palisade walls and tall flagpoles.
